parsed.production_notes: The video combines a human-recorded bottom half with an AI-generated 3D animated avatar in the top half. The avatar exhibits typical stylized 3D features, perfectly smooth skin, and slightly unnatural, looped idle movements.

characters.appearance: 3D animated female character in her 20s. She has a fair complexion, large green eyes, and wavy red hair. She wears delicate crescent moon earrings.
Human male in his 20s. He has a light complexion, dark hair faded on the sides, and a neatly trimmed beard.
characters.wardrobe: A plain black t-shirt, a thin silver necklace, and white wireless earbuds.
characters.demeanor: Attentive, slightly hesitant, but willing to learn.

scenes.setting: Top: dressing room with vanity lights. Bottom: modern home interior.

panels.panel_visual_description: A 3D animated female character is framed from the chest up, looking directly forward. She has wavy red hair, fair skin, and large, expressive green eyes. She is wearing a simple white top and delicate crescent moon earrings. Her right hand is raised, gently resting her chin on her knuckles in a relaxed pose. The background features a softly blurred dressing room environment. A large mirror is visible behind her, framed by glowing, round vanity lights. The lighting on the character is soft and flattering, highlighting her stylized features.

A young human male is framed from the chest up, facing the camera directly. He has a light complexion, dark hair that is faded on the sides, and a neatly trimmed beard. He is wearing a plain black t-shirt, a thin silver necklace, and white wireless earbuds. His expression is attentive and slightly animated as he speaks. The background consists of a brightly lit, modern home interior. A glass door and plain white walls are visible behind him. The lighting is natural and even, casting soft shadows on his face.

scenes.visual_description: The scene is a split-screen layout divided horizontally across the middle. The top half displays a 3D animated female avatar in a brightly lit dressing room setting. The bottom half shows a live-action recording of a young man in a modern home interior. Both characters maintain eye contact with the camera, creating the illusion of a face-to-face video call. Dynamic subtitles appear in the center of the screen, overlapping both panels. A row of United States flags is overlaid at the very top of the frame. The overall composition feels like a modern social media duet or reaction video.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Você consegue falar inglês? [Can you speak English?]

Character B says: É... sabor inglês. [Yeah... flavor English.]

Character A says: Certo, mas os nativos dizem assim: "I speak English". [Right, but natives say it like this: "I speak English".]

Character B says: I speak English. [I speak English.]

Character A says: Quantos anos você tem? [How old are you?]

Character B says: I have 24. [I have 24.]

Character A says: Hmm... você quis dizer "I am 24", né? [Hmm... you meant "I am 24", right?]

Character B says: Isso mesmo, I am 24! [That's right, I am 24!]

Character A says: Mandou bem! [Well done!]

Character B says: Obrigado! Quem é você? [Thank you! Who are you?]

Character A says: Meu nome é Skye! Podemos praticar inglês conversando todos os dias. [My name is Skye! We can practice English by chatting every day.]

Character B says: Ah, mas... meu inglês é muito básico. Eu não consigo conversar. [Ah, but... my English is very basic. I can't converse.]

Character A says: Tudo bem, eu posso te ensinar falando português. Conforme você vai ficando craque, a gente vai falando mais em inglês do que português. [That's fine, I can teach you speaking Portuguese. As you get better, we will speak more in English than Portuguese.]

Character B says: É... se você me ensinar em português primeiro fica mais fácil. Como que faz para a gente conversar? [Yeah... if you teach me in Portuguese first it's easier. How do we chat?]

Character A says: É só baixar o aplicativo Praktika. [Just download the Praktika app.]

Character B says: Ta! Vou baixar o Praktika! [Okay! I'll download Praktika!]

panels.panel_visual_description: The panel consists entirely of a solid, uniform white background. There are no characters, props, or environmental elements present in the frame. The lighting is completely flat and even, with no shadows or gradients visible. The composition is entirely empty, serving as a blank canvas. No textures or depth cues are discernible. The scene remains perfectly static throughout its duration.

scenes.visual_description: The scene transitions to a static end card with a solid white background. In the center of the screen, a purple, rounded-square app icon is prominently displayed. Below the icon, the app's name is written in bold purple text. At the bottom of the frame, two standard app store download badges are positioned side-by-side. The layout is clean, minimalist, and focused entirely on driving app downloads. The overall aesthetic is bright and corporate.

praktika.ai
